item.title: She Disappeared After Leaving a Bar With Two Men!
item.description: A night out ended in mystery when a young woman vanished after leaving a bar with two men. What happened next, and what secrets might this case still hold?

media:content.media:title: She Disappeared After Leaving a Bar With Two Men!
media:content.media:description: A night out ended in mystery when a young woman vanished after leaving a bar with two men. What happened next, and what secrets might this case still hold?

item.title: The Disappearance of Sofia Juarez
item.description: Explore the mystery of Sofia Juarez, whose disappearance continues to raise questions decades later. What clues remain in this haunting case?

media:content.media:title: The Disappearance of Sofia Juarez
media:content.media:description: Explore the mystery of Sofia Juarez, whose disappearance continues to raise questions decades later. What clues remain in this haunting case?

item.title: Madeline Sophia Soto – February 26, 2024
item.description: Thirteen‑year‑old Madeline Soto vanished on her way to school in Florida, sparking a desperate search. What happened on that heartbreaking Monday, and how did investigators uncover the truth?

media:content.media:title: Madeline Sophia Soto – February 26, 2024
media:content.media:description: Thirteen‑year‑old Madeline Soto vanished on her way to school in Florida, sparking a desperate search. What happened on that heartbreaking Monday, and how did investigators uncover the truth?

item.title: Claimed It Was Self‑Inflicted, but Her Body Didn’t Lie
item.description: A case where the claim of self‑infliction didn’t match the evidence. What did the body reveal that changed the story?

media:content.media:title: Claimed It Was Self‑Inflicted, but Her Body Didn’t Lie
media:content.media:description: A case where the claim of self‑infliction didn’t match the evidence. What did the body reveal that changed the story?

item.title: Yoshihiro Hattori – Part 1
item.description: In 1992, Japanese exchange student Yoshihiro Hattori knocked on the wrong door while heading to a Halloween party in Louisiana. What tragic chain of events turned a simple mistake into an international debate on gun laws?

media:content.media:title: Yoshihiro Hattori – Part 1
media:content.media:description: In 1992, Japanese exchange student Yoshihiro Hattori knocked on the wrong door while heading to a Halloween party in Louisiana. What tragic chain of events turned a simple mistake into an international debate on gun laws?

item.title: Betrayed by the One She Trusted Most
item.description: The case of Maria Fernanda López reveals how betrayal by someone close can lead to devastating consequences. How did trust become her downfall?

media:content.media:title: Betrayed by the One She Trusted Most
media:content.media:description: The case of Maria Fernanda López reveals how betrayal by someone close can lead to devastating consequences. How did trust become her downfall?

item.title: A Chilling Warning Before She Disappeared
item.description: The Ana María Serrano case reveals how a chilling warning preceded her disappearance. What did she say before vanishing, and how did it shape the investigation?

media:content.media:title: A Chilling Warning Before She Disappeared
media:content.media:description: The Ana María Serrano case reveals how a chilling warning preceded her disappearance. What did she say before vanishing, and how did it shape the investigation?

item.title: The Disappearance of Monica Carrasco
item.description: Explore the mystery surrounding Monica Carrasco, whose story continues to raise questions. What clues remain in this unresolved case?
